title: Momonosuke Faces Wano’s Future
description: On pages 22–25, this part focuses on Unknown person #21, Unknown person #22, Unknown person #23, Unknown person #24, Usopp as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: usop, did you do that?! wow!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Y-Yeah! Just as I planned! That's what happens when you mess with usopp!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, Carrot nose, you're fabulous!! You did it!! There's a gap in the formation to the South!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: We can sail right through the hole!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Black Cage" Hina, the Navy Captain Who's in charge of this region!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's bad news all right!! We gotta get outta here quick!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: We've inflicted heavy damage to their ship.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No vessel exists that my black spear formation can't destroy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But don't let down your guard. Sea rats like these will turn and bite you when you least expect it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When we pull alongside them, I want the rest of you to stay back.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: If you get in my way...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you doing?! We have to escape!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All we have to do is sail through that gap in their formation and we're swan free!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we keep sailing this way, they'll sink us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hurry, Mr. Bon Clay!! Let's get outta here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have to meet someone at noon ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We don't have time to sail around them. We have to go straight ahead.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's so important that you're going to sail to your deaths?! Fine, throw away your lives if you want!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For a moment I mistook you for your late mother...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 50 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
